messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Did Mencius write the Zhuangzi (莊子)?

No. The Zhuangzi (莊子) is attributed to Zhuangzi (also romanized as Chuang Tzu), a Daoist thinker, not to Mencius. Mencius was a Confucian philosopher associated with the text bearing his own name (孟子). The Zhuangzi and the Mencian tradition belong to quite different philosophical schools — Daoism and Confucianism respectively.
